column1: 声が出なくて、返事をするにもできなかった。
column2: こえがでなくて、へんじをするにもできなかった。
column3: I had no voice and couldn't reply even if I wanted to.
column4: にも〜ない (cannot ~ even if one wants to, would like to but cannot)
column6: expresses frustrated inability — wanting to do something but being physically or circumstantially unable
column8: にも〜ない = want to but cannot (frustrated); ようがない = no way to (method-based impossibility); ようもない = same; 〜たくてもできない = want to but can't
